name: Oracle IDCS Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures Oracle IDCS access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT o.id, o.username, o.email, e.termination_date FROM oracle_idcs_users o JOIN employees e ON LOWER(o.email) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(o.active, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows where possible.
